'''Nania''' was a member of the [[Freelies]].

She, like all Freelies, sabotaged the factories of [[Vorzyd IV]], to make the people realize that the job was not the main thing in a perfect society that the [[Vorzydiak]]s tried to built. She was a supporter and a good friend of [[Grath (Vorzydiak)|Grath]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
